display_information.name: Izzie
display_information.long_description:
Izzie is your private AI assistant that knows your professional context — your relationships, email history, and calendar — and helps you work smarter across every channel.

  What Izzie does:

  💬 Conversational AI in Slack — Talk to Izzie just like you would a colleague. Ask questions, search your data, get answers.

  📅 Calendar & Tasks — "What's on my calendar this week?" "Create a task to follow up with Sarah by Friday." Izzie has live access to your Google Calendar and Tasks.

  ✉️ Email drafting — Ask Izzie to draft an email or reply. It'll show you a preview and wait for your approval before sending — you stay in control.

  🔍 Unified search — Search across your iMessage history, Slack messages, calendar, tasks, and the web in a single command.

  🌤️ Proactive briefings — Morning summaries, weather alerts, train delays, and follow-up reminders delivered directly to you.

  🤖 Proxy mode — Izzie can monitor channels and draft suggested replies for your review. Approve with one word, edit, or ignore — your choice.

  🛠️ Self-extending — Izzie can design and build new capabilities on demand. Just describe what you want and it handles the rest.

  Izzie runs locally on your Mac. Your data never leaves your machine.

assistant_view.assistant_description: Your personal AI that knows your professional context — contacts, emails, projects, and schedule. Ask me to search your network, draft messages, check trains, or pull up anything from your history. Approves actions before sending on your behalf.
